graphEvents.detail: Created research.md with executive summary, routing-surface inventory, corpus methodology, Gate 3 and advisor baselines, joint error analysis, ranked proposals, and implementation handoff
Recommended remediation child is 019-system-hardening/004-routing-accuracy-hardening with advisor normalization first and Gate 3 deep-loop markers second
Iteration 8 introduced no substantive new findings; the packet is converged and implementation-ready

summary: research.md now consolidates the full 200-prompt routing study into one implementation-ready narrative covering the two routing surfaces, corpus method, measured baselines, joint-error clustering, and ranked remediation order.

Implementation should move into 019-system-hardening/004-routing-accuracy-hardening, starting with advisor command-surface normalization and then Gate 3 deep-loop marker expansion before considering the smaller resume/context and mixed-tail follow-ons.

The routing problem is broad but tractable: 75.6% of the 127 total failures are single-surface misses, so the highest-return remediation path is staged local rule cleanup rather than a broad re-architecture or threshold retuning.
